name: Hawthorn Bancshares, Inc.
summary: Hawthorn Bancshares, Inc. operates as the bank holding company for Hawthorn Bank that provides various banking services in Missouri. It offers checking and savings accounts, and certificates of deposit; debit and credit cards; and commercial and industrial, single payment personal, installment, and commercial and residential real estate loans. The company also provides trust, Internet banking, and brokerage services; and safety deposit boxes. It operates 23 banking offices. The company was founded in 1865 and is headquartered in Jefferson City, Missouri.
